---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the macOS app, developer workflow, or open source project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**What area does this affect?**
- Vault security / encryption
- Onboarding / unlock flow
- Secret editing / templates
- Import / export / backups
- Search / command palette / menu bar
- Build / release / repository

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional details**
- If this affects a direct-download release, mention your PassStore version and macOS version.
- If this affects the open source repo, mention whether you are building from Xcode or CLI.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
